report.summary: Analysis complete for a 8-room floor plan. 64 structural elements were identified, of which 55 are load-bearing (walls, columns, slab). Material recommendations were generated using weighted tradeoff scoring — load-bearing elements prioritise strength and durability, while partition walls prioritise cost efficiency. 27 structural concern(s) require attention before construction. Estimated material cost: ₹14,692,818–₹18,774,153.

element_reports.explanation: RCC is recommended for this load bearing wall with a tradeoff score of 5.500. As a load-bearing element, strength (60%) and durability (30%) dominate the scoring. With a span of 84.95m (exceeding the 5m threshold for standard masonry), this material's very high strength and very high durability best match the structural demand. Steel Frame scores 5.500 — a delta of 0.000 below RCC. Steel Frame would be preferred in budget-constrained scenarios where the span is below 3m and structural risk is lower.
